name: Eggsellent Weeruptor
description: Eggsellent Weeruptor is an Easter counterpart of the Fire Mini, Weeruptor, in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: It's springtime again and Weeruptor was chosen as this year's official mascot for the Annual Dragon Egg Hunt! Being new to this time honored tradition, he disguised himself as a candy-coated egg and proceeded to capture Spyro, Cynder, and Drobot within a Traptanium basket. Sort of missing the point of the occasion. But what he lacks in point-getting, he more than makes up for in 'Eggsellence'!
personality: Eggsellent Weeruptor is enthusiastic about festive traditions, though he is somewhat literal-minded, which led him to capture his fellow Skylanders during an egg hunt. He is determined to live up to his mascot role with 'Eggsellence'.

story.content: It's springtime again and Weeruptor was chosen as this year's official mascot for the Annual Dragon Egg Hunt! Being new to this time honored tradition, he disguised himself as a candy-coated egg and proceeded to capture Spyro, Cynder, and Drobot within a Traptanium basket. Sort of missing the point of the occasion. But what he lacks in point-getting, he more than makes up for in 'Eggsellence'!

trivia: He, Power Punch Pet-Vac, and Gnarly Barkley are the only Minis to be available in single packs instead of double packs.
gameplay: Eggsellent Weeruptor plays identically to Weeruptor and Eruptor, focusing on area-of-effect fire attacks. He can lob lava at a distance or create eruptions to clear out enemies surrounding him. Despite his small size, he retains the full power of his larger counterpart.

basic.name: Lava Lob
basic.content: Lobs a chunk of lava at enemies.

basic.name: Eruption
basic.content: Causes a localized volcanic eruption to damage nearby foes.

basic_upgrades.name: Big Blob Lava Throw
basic_upgrades.content: Increases the size and damage of lava projectiles.

basic_upgrades.name: Heavy Duty Plasma
basic_upgrades.content: Enhances the lava with plasma for higher intensity.

basic_upgrades.name: Quick Eruption
basic_upgrades.content: Reduces the cooldown and increases the speed of eruptions.
